name: Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and flour in a heavy saucepan.
2. Blend in the cold water, stirring constantly over moderate heat until boiling and thickened.
3. Reduce the heat to low and add the unsweetened chocolate. Cook and stir until the chocolate melts.
4. Add the butter and vanilla. Stir until smooth.
5. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before serving warm.
Makes 1 1/4 Cups
